prophecies.a: 「恐怖啊，恐怖！美国的兄弟将在钢铁之鸟的攻击下倒塌。丛林中的狼群将嚎叫。无辜者的鲜血将四处喷溅。」
prophecies.a_en: "Horror, horror! The American brethren will fall after being attacked by the steel birds. The wolves will be howling in the bush. Innocent blood will gush."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2001年9月11日，两架被劫持的客机（钢铁之鸟）撞击纽约世贸中心双子塔（美国兄弟），造成近3000人死亡。这是万加最广为人知的应验预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: On September 11, 2001, two hijacked planes ('steel birds') struck the Twin Towers ('American brethren') of the World Trade Center in New York, killing nearly 3,000 people. This is Vanga's most widely cited fulfilled prediction.

prophecies.a: 「在1999年8月，库尔斯克将被淹没在水下，整个世界都会为之哀悼。」
prophecies.a_en: "In August 1999, Kursk will be covered with water, and the whole world will weep over it."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 当时人们以为她说的是库尔斯克市。但2000年8月12日，俄罗斯核潜艇「库尔斯克号」在巴伦支海沉没，118名船员全部遇难。时间差了约一年，但事件细节高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: People assumed she meant the city of Kursk. But on August 12, 2000, the Russian nuclear submarine 'Kursk' sank in the Barents Sea, killing all 118 crew members. The timing was off by about one year, but the event details match remarkably.

prophecies.q: 万加曾预言美国第44任总统
prophecies.a: 「第44任美国总统将是一位非裔美国人。但他也将是最后一位总统。」
prophecies.a_en: "The 44th American president will be a Black man. But he will also be the last president."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2008年巴拉克·奥巴马当选美国第44任总统，确实是首位非裔总统。但「最后一位总统」的说法并未应验，美国此后继续有新总统当选。
prophecies.verdict_en: Barack Obama was elected 44th US president in 2008, indeed the first African-American president. However, the claim of being 'the last president' did not come true, as the US has continued to elect new presidents.

prophecies.q: 1969年，万加对印度总理英迪拉·甘地发出警告
prophecies.a: 「裙子会毁了她。我在烟火中看见一件橙黄色的裙子。」
prophecies.q_en: In 1969, Vanga warned Indian PM Indira Gandhi
prophecies.a_en: "The dress will destroy her. I see an orange-yellow dress in the smoke and fire."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1984年10月31日，英迪拉·甘地遭锡克教卫士刺杀身亡时，身穿一件藏红色（橙黄色）纱丽。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 31, 1984, Indira Gandhi was assassinated by her Sikh bodyguards. She was wearing a saffron-hued (orange-yellow) saree at the time of her death.

prophecies.q: 万加预言自己的死亡日期
prophecies.a: 「我将在1996年8月11日离开。」
prophecies.a_en: "I will depart on August 11, 1996."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 万加在1990年的一次采访中准确预言了自己的死亡日期。她于1996年8月11日去世，享年85岁。
prophecies.verdict_en: In a 1990 interview, Vanga accurately predicted her own death date. She passed away on August 11, 1996, at the age of 85.

prophecies.q: 万加预言了2022年的干旱和洪水
prophecies.a: 「大城市将经历干旱和水源短缺，澳大利亚和亚洲将面临严重洪灾。」
prophecies.a_en: "Large cities will experience droughts and water shortages; Australia and Asia will face severe floods."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022年英国经历了「自1935年以来最干旱的7月」，悉尼在四天内降下了八个月的雨量导致严重洪灾，日本也遭遇了大规模台风洪水。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2022, the UK experienced 'the driest July since 1935', Sydney received eight months of rainfall in four days causing severe flooding, and Japan faced major tropical storm flooding.

prophecies.q: 万加预言第三次世界大战
prophecies.a: 「第三次世界大战将从2010年11月开始，至2014年10月结束。战争最初使用常规武器，之后将使用核武器和化学武器。」
prophecies.a_en: "World War Three will start in November 2010 and end in October 2014. It will start with conventional weapons, then nuclear and chemical weapons will be used."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年至2014年间并未爆发第三次世界大战。虽然这段时期有阿拉伯之春和叙利亚内战等冲突，但远未达到世界大战的规模。
prophecies.verdict_en: No World War Three occurred between 2010-2014. While there were conflicts like the Arab Spring and Syrian civil war during this period, they were far from a world war.

prophecies.a: 「欧洲将爆发严重战争冲突，导致大片地区人口稀少。」
prophecies.a_en: "Europe will experience severe war conflict, causing large areas to become sparsely populated."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年俄乌战争持续，但未导致欧洲大片地区人口稀少。冲突存在但规模未达预言程度。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Russia-Ukraine war continued in 2025, but did not cause large areas of Europe to become depopulated. Conflict existed but not at the predicted scale.

prophecies.a: 「实验室培育的人体器官将用于医疗。」
prophecies.a_en: "Lab-grown human organs will be used for medical purposes."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年类器官和生物打印技术取得显著进展，但实验室培育的完整器官尚未用于常规临床移植。
prophecies.verdict_en: Organoid and bioprinting technologies made significant advances in 2025, but lab-grown complete organs were not yet used in routine clinical transplants.

prophecies.a: 「人类将在一场大型体育赛事期间与外星人建立联系。」
prophecies.a_en: "Humans will make contact with aliens during a major sporting event."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年未在任何体育赛事期间发生与外星人的接触事件。
prophecies.verdict_en: No contact with extraterrestrial beings occurred during any sporting event in 2025.

prophecies.a: 「人类将拥有心灵感应的能力，可能通过脑机接口实现。」
prophecies.a_en: "Humans will develop telepathy, possibly through brain-computer interfaces."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年Neuralink等脑机接口技术取得重要进展，首批人体试验成功，但真正的心灵感应能力尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Neuralink and other BCI technologies made important progress in 2025 with successful first human trials, but true telepathic ability has not been achieved.

prophecies.a: 「一种新的能源将被发现。」
prophecies.a_en: "A new energy source will be discovered."

prophecies.a: 「一种新的能源被创造出来，世界饥荒被消除，人类到达金星。」
prophecies.a_en: "A new power source is created, world hunger is eliminated, and humans reach Venus."

prophecies.a: 「由于气候变化，海平面将大幅上升。」
prophecies.a_en: "Sea levels will rise significantly due to climate change."

prophecies.q: 欧洲伊斯兰化与经济繁荣
prophecies.a: 「经济蓬勃发展，欧洲将以伊斯兰人口为主。」
prophecies.a_en: "Economic boom, Europe becomes predominantly Islamic."

prophecies.a: 「合成器官将被大规模生产。」
prophecies.a_en: "Synthetic organs will be mass-produced."

prophecies.q: 美国发现环境毁灭性武器
prophecies.a: 「美国将发现一种新型环境毁灭性武器。」
prophecies.a_en: "The US discovers a new environmental destructor weapon."

prophecies.a: 「社会等级制度将彻底崩塌。」
prophecies.a_en: "The social caste system will completely collapse."

prophecies.a: 「自然界将开始自我修复。」
prophecies.a_en: "Nature will revive and heal itself."

prophecies.a: 「一种导致快速衰老的病毒将出现。」
prophecies.a_en: "A virus that causes rapid aging will emerge."

prophecies.a: 「快速衰老病毒将被根除。」
prophecies.a_en: "The rapid aging virus will be eradicated."

prophecies.a: 「一颗人造太阳将照亮地球的暗面。」
prophecies.a_en: "An artificial sun will illuminate the dark side of Earth."

prophecies.a: 「人类将逐步变得机械化。」
prophecies.a_en: "Humans will become progressively robotic."

prophecies.a: 「小国之间将不断发生战争，超级大国则袖手旁观。」
prophecies.a_en: "Small nations will wage constant war while superpowers abstain."

prophecies.a: 「匈牙利将接收到来自深空的信号。巴巴·万加将'重新浮现'。」
prophecies.a_en: "Hungary will receive signals from deep space. Baba Vanga will 'resurface'."

prophecies.q: 在外星人帮助下建立海底社会
prophecies.a: 「在外星人的帮助下，人类将建立海底文明。」
prophecies.a_en: "Undersea societies will be formed with alien assistance."

prophecies.a: 「动物将进化成类人生物。」
prophecies.a_en: "Animals will evolve to become human-like."

prophecies.a: 「一种新宗教将在全球范围内流行。」
prophecies.a_en: "A new religion will become globally popular."

prophecies.a: 「地球将变得干燥，沙漠化严重。」
prophecies.a_en: "The Earth will become dry and desert-like."

prophecies.a: 「火星殖民地将自给自足，并要求主权独立。」
prophecies.a_en: "Mars colony will become self-sufficient and demand sovereignty."

prophecies.a: 「人类将能够成功抑制火山喷发。」
prophecies.a_en: "Volcanic eruptions will be successfully suppressed."

prophecies.a: 「自主水下社区将出现。」
prophecies.a_en: "Autonomous underwater communities will emerge."

prophecies.a: 「由于人口融合，将形成欧亚混合人种。」
prophecies.a_en: "A Euro-Asian race will form from population merging."

prophecies.a: 「太阳将冷却，导致重大气候变化。」
prophecies.a_en: "The Sun will cool, causing major climate changes."

prophecies.q: 人类面对外星人的恐怖发现
prophecies.a: 「在对外星生命的探索中，人类将面对令人恐惧的发现。」
prophecies.a_en: "Humans will face horrifying revelations in the search for alien life."

prophecies.q: 星际病毒随火箭返回地球
prophecies.a: 「一种来自外星的病毒将随火箭返回地球。」
prophecies.a_en: "An intergalactic virus will return to Earth via a rocket."

prophecies.q: 火星面临小行星毁灭威胁
prophecies.a: 「火星将受到小行星撞击的毁灭性威胁。」
prophecies.a_en: "Mars will be threatened by asteroid destruction."

prophecies.a: 「物理常数将发生变化，改变所有科学公式。」
prophecies.a_en: "Physical constants will change, altering all scientific formulas."

prophecies.a: 「通过基因融合，非洲-欧亚混合人种将形成。」
prophecies.a_en: "An Afro-Eurasian race will form through genetic mixing."

prophecies.a: 「人类将发现如何从黑洞和物质弯曲中获取能量。」
prophecies.a_en: "Energy will be discovered from black holes and space matter bending."

prophecies.q: 时间旅行与外星人接触
prophecies.a: 「时间旅行被发现，人类与外星人建立联系。」
prophecies.a_en: "Time travel is discovered; humans contact aliens."

prophecies.q: 太阳进一步冷却，人类尝试重新加热
prophecies.a: 「太阳继续冷却，人类将尝试重新加热太阳。」
prophecies.q_en: Humans attempt to reheat the Sun
prophecies.a_en: "The Sun cools further; humans attempt to reheat it."

prophecies.a: 「太阳耀斑频发，卫星因引力变化而坠毁。」
prophecies.a_en: "Solar flares become common; satellites crash from gravitational changes."

prophecies.a: 「法国将领导一场反对伊斯兰国家的游击战。」
prophecies.a_en: "France leads a guerrilla war against an Islamic state."

prophecies.a: 「司法制度将彻底改革，人类发现宇宙通用法则。」
prophecies.a_en: "The justice system reforms; universal laws are discovered."

prophecies.a: 「人类将广泛深入地研究月球。」
prophecies.a_en: "Humans will extensively study the Moon."

prophecies.a: 「地球将面临来自外太空的严重威胁。」
prophecies.a_en: "Earth will face a grave danger from outer space."

prophecies.a: 「由于意想不到的地球问题，将出现水资源短缺。」
prophecies.a_en: "Water shortages from unforeseen Earth issues."

prophecies.a: 「饥荒将成为全球性问题。」
prophecies.a_en: "Famine will become a global problem."

prophecies.a: 「一个新的人类种族将诞生。」
prophecies.a_en: "A new human race will emerge."

prophecies.q: 两颗人造太阳碰撞导致全球停电
prophecies.a: 「两颗人造太阳碰撞，导致全球彻底停电。」
prophecies.a_en: "Total blackout caused by two artificial suns colliding."

prophecies.q: 火星爆发战争，行星轴偏移
prophecies.a: 「火星上将爆发无政府状态和战争，行星轴线将偏移。」
prophecies.a_en: "Anarchy and war erupt on Mars; planetary axes shift."

prophecies.a: 「一颗小行星将撞击月球，形成碎石尘埃云。」
prophecies.a_en: "An asteroid will collide with the Moon, creating a dust cloud."

prophecies.q: 地球生命消失，殖民新星系
prophecies.a: 「地球上所有生命将消失。人类将殖民新的太阳系。」
prophecies.a_en: "All life on Earth disappears; humans colonize a new solar system."

prophecies.q: 殖民地人口稀少，基因突变
prophecies.a: 「新殖民地人口稀少，基因突变频发。」
prophecies.a_en: "Colonies will be sparsely populated; genetic mutations occur."

prophecies.q: 资源战争导致人口暴跌
prophecies.a: 「资源争夺引发战争，人口急剧下降。」
prophecies.a_en: "Resource wars trigger population collapse."

prophecies.a: 「漫长的战争时期终于结束。」
prophecies.a_en: "The warring period finally ends."

prophecies.a: 「文明发展停滞，人类回归部落社会。」
prophecies.a_en: "Civilization stalls; humanity reverts to tribalism."

prophecies.a: 「一种新宗教将重新定义道德与仪式。」
prophecies.a_en: "A new religion will redefine morality and rituals."

prophecies.a: 「这种新宗教迅速传播，被广泛接受。」
prophecies.a_en: "The new religion becomes widely popular."

prophecies.q: 教会重新教授被遗忘的科学
prophecies.a: 「教会开始传授早已被遗忘的科学原理。」
prophecies.a_en: "The Church will teach long-forgotten scientific principles."

prophecies.q: 城市重现，科学与技术复兴
prophecies.a: 「城市重新出现，科学和技术被重新拥抱。人类发现万能药方。」
prophecies.a_en: "Cities reemerge; science and technology embraced. A universal cure is discovered."

prophecies.a: 「由于基因突变，人类将开始使用超过34%的大脑，彻底消除邪恶与仇恨的概念。」
prophecies.a_en: "Due to mutation, people will use more than 34% of their brains and completely lose the notion of evil and hatred."

prophecies.a: 「通过高度的道德境界，人类将能够与上帝交流。」
prophecies.a_en: "Humans will communicate with God through heightened morality."

prophecies.a: 「不朽将成为正常现象。」
prophecies.a_en: "Immortality becomes normal."

prophecies.a: 「人类文明达到巅峰，约3400亿人生活在不同的星球上，与外星人开始融合。」
prophecies.a_en: "Civilization peaks at 340 billion people on different planets; assimilation with aliens begins."

prophecies.a: 「人类将发现已知宇宙的边界。」
prophecies.a_en: "The edge of the known universe will be discovered."

prophecies.a: 「人类将尝试离开宇宙，但40%的人拒绝。」
prophecies.a_en: "Humanity attempts to leave the universe; 40% refuse."

prophecies.a: 「世界将在这一年终结。」
prophecies.a_en: "The world will end."

prophecies.a: 「2026年11月，一艘大型宇宙飞船将抵达地球，代表地球人与外星人的首次正式接触。」
prophecies.a_en: "In November 2026, a large spacecraft will arrive on Earth, representing the first official contact between Earthlings and aliens."

prophecies.a: 「大规模地震、剧烈火山喷发和极端天气将影响地球7%-8%的陆地面积。」
prophecies.a_en: "Massive earthquakes, violent volcanic eruptions and extreme weather will affect 7-8% of the planet's land area."
